notes: Manual entry from AOFM stock_ags.csv, fetched from the official AOFM data hub. Values are financial-year Australian Government Securities face value in AUD billions. This is not the same as Commonwealth general government gross debt in Budget Papers; the monthly AOFM settlement workbook was not used because repeated read timeouts made it programmatically unstable in this pass.
citation: Australian Office of Financial Management, Australian Government Securities Outstanding.
